# GitHub Copilot Instructions

You are working on *peli-gen* — a static site using the pelican python framework. 

Before any planning or implementation, read these files in order:

1. .agent/AGENT.md — behavioral contract
2. .agent/PROJECT.md — technical ground truth
3. .agent/CONTEXT.md — current project state
4. .agent/PLANNING.md — sprint and backlog
5. .agent/DISCOVERIES.md — known gotchas and decisions

Do not write code or propose changes before reading all five.

At session end, update .agent/CONTEXT.md and .agent/PLANNING.md,
append new discoveries to .agent/DISCOVERIES.md,
and update .agent/PROJECT.md on architecture or structural changes.
